name: No Fatigue (Skipper only)
description:
Skipper energy is always at 100%.

There is a full crew version of this mod, available here:
https://steamcommunity.com/sharedfiles/filedetails/?id=2567998029

This mod has been tested with 2026.1.
This mod works with existing savegames and does not alter game state (except set energy to 100%).

Source for this mod is available here.
https://github.com/shole/uboat-mods
author: shole
